query:
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET finished_at = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR) 
WHERE section='Boonphone' AND entity='all' AND status='error' 
AND started_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
UPDATE sync_logs 
SET finished_at = DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR) 
WHERE section='Boonphone' AND entity='all' AND status='error' 
AND started_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
